name: react-native-overlay
description: Stack-conventions overlay for React Native (Expo managed/dev-client or bare RN) + TypeScript projects. Provides the stack-conventions skill the core feature-factory agents consult for build/run/native-config/e2e/verify rules on mobile. Detects Expo vs bare RN and the project's e2e harness (Detox/Maestro), asking only when the repo is ambiguous. Enable only on matching repos.
